title: CTOV - Incubation Compat
description: Compatibility add-on for Incubation mod and CTOV
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Incubation. You will find chicken coops in villages. 1.18+ datapack is for Forge.

**Incubation mod**

Incubation mod can be obtained from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/incubation)


**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
